body.name: cumulative_average_trading_day_duration
body.tooltip_info: The average length of time you were active in the market each trading day, measured from the first to the last trade execution of the day, across all applicable days.

body.name: cumulative_average_hold_time
body.tooltip_info: Your average hold time, or how long you were in a trade, is based on ALL trades taken.

body.name: cumulative_average_minimum_profits
body.tooltip_info: The average minimum profits on all your trades.

body.name: cumulative_average_maximum_profits
body.tooltip_info: The average maximum profits on all your trades.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_average_pl
body.tooltip_info: Shows the average profit or loss per trading day over the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_avg_drawdown
body.tooltip_info: Shows the average drawdown during the selected period and the drawdown at the end of that period, or the current drawdown if no date filter is applied.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_average_volume
body.tooltip_info: The average volume, or quantity of contracts/shares traded on a daily basis.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_win_percentage
body.tooltip_info: Reflects the percentage of your winning trading days out of total trading days.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_average_win_loss
body.tooltip_info: Displays average profit on winning days compared to the average loss on losing days during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_average_pl
body.tooltip_info: The average P/L based on all your trades. What is your usual trade outcome? How much do you make on average on each trade?

body.name: cumulative_average_win_loss
body.tooltip_info: Displays average profit on winning days compared to the average loss on losing days during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_average_planned_rr
body.tooltip_info: The average PLANNED R Multiple on all your trades. Note: This stat is based on trades where you manually inputted your profit target and stop loss for the trade.

body.name: cumulative_average_realized_rr
body.tooltip_info: The average REALIZED R Multiple on all your trades. Note: This stat is based on trades where you manually inputted your stop loss for the trade. This measures your R multiple on all your trades and takes the average to display your average R multiple on your trades.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_breakeven_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of trading days where your net result indicates neither a gain nor a loss. This usually means a net result of exactly $0, but you can adjust the thresholds in your breakeven settings.

body.name: cumulative_breakeven_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of trades where your net result was exactly $0, indicating neither a gain nor a loss.

body.name: cumulative_largest_loss
body.tooltip_info: The single trade with the highest realized loss, representing the most capital lost on a trade during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_largest_profit
body.tooltip_info: The single trade with the highest realized profit in your trading history for the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_logged_days_count
body.tooltip_info: The total number of days for which you created a note in your journal.

body.name: cumulative_longest_trade_duration
body.tooltip_info: The maximum time spent in a single trade, calculated from entry to exit. Shows the trade with the longest holding period during the selected timeframe.

body.name: cumulative_longs_breakeven_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of long trades that closed with exactly $0 P&L (or around it based on your trade settings), resulting in neither profit nor loss.

body.name: cumulative_longs_loss_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of loss-making trades executed as long positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_longs_open_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of open (unclosed) long trades currently active or unclosed during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_longs_total_count
body.tooltip_info: Total number of the trades executed as long positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_longs_win_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of profitable trades executed as long positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_longs_win_rate
body.tooltip_info: The percentage of winning trades based only on your long positions.

body.name: cumulative_losing_days_count
body.tooltip_info: The cumulative number of trading days where you had a net loss. This tracks your unprofitable trading days over time.

body.name: cumulative_loss_count
body.tooltip_info: The cumulative number of loss-making trades executed during the selected period. This tracks your trading activity and volume of unsuccessful trades over time.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_max_loss_streak
body.tooltip_info: The longest streak of consecutive trading days that ended in a loss.

body.name: cumulative_max_trade_loss_streak
body.tooltip_info: The highest number of back-to-back losing trades recorded without a win in between.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_max_win_streak
body.tooltip_info: The longest streak of consecutive trading days that ended in profit.

body.name: cumulative_max_trade_win_streak
body.tooltip_info: The highest number of back-to-back winning trades recorded without a loss in between.

body.name: cumulative_bucketed_max_drawdown
body.tooltip_info: This is the max drawdown experienced for the defined period.

body.name: cumulative_max_trading_day_duration
body.tooltip_info: The longest active trading day duration, based on the time difference between the earliest and latest executed trades on a single day.

body.name: cumulative_pl
body.tooltip_info: The total realized Profit and Loss (P/L) on all closed positions, for the date range selected.

body.name: cumulative_open_trades_count
body.tooltip_info: The cumulative number of all open (unclosed) trades currently active or unclosed during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_profit_factor
body.tooltip_info: Measure your profitability by comparing your gross profits to your gross losses.

body.name: cumulative_sharpe
body.tooltip_info: Measures risk-adjusted returns. Higher values indicate better returns relative to volatility. Calculated using daily returns with 252 trading days annualization. Values above 1 are considered good.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_breakeven_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of short trades that closed with exactly $0 P&L (or around it based on your trade settings), resulting in neither profit nor loss.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_loss_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of loss-making trades executed as short positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_open_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of open (unclosed) short trades currently active or unclosed during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_total_count
body.tooltip_info: Total number of the trades executed as short positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_win_count
body.tooltip_info: The number of profitable trades executed as short positions during the selected period.

body.name: cumulative_shorts_win_rate
body.tooltip_info: The percentage of winning trades based only on your short positions.

body.name: cumulative_sortino
body.tooltip_info: Measures risk-adjusted returns using only downside volatility. Unlike Sharpe, only penalizes losses, not upside volatility. Higher is better. Values above 1.5 are considered good.

body.name: cumulative_trade_expectancy
body.tooltip_info: How much you are expected to make on your future trades based on historical performance. For % view this is expected trade ROI.

body.name: cumulative_volume
body.tooltip_info: The total volume, or quantity of contracts/shares traded.

body.name: cumulative_win_count
body.tooltip_info: The cumulative number of profitable trades executed during the selected period. This tracks your trading activity and volume of successful trades over time.

body.name: cumulative_win_percentage
body.tooltip_info: The percentage of winning trades out of your total trades.

body.name: cumulative_winning_days_count
body.tooltip_info: The cumulative number of trading days where you had a net profit. This tracks your successful trading days over time.
